data.content: Plan review approved. The current leaderboard implementation in src/components/lease-audit-helpers.ts computes mean, ranking, and totalN from all completed rows, so the planned change to qualify agents first is necessary and sufficient. Implement the >=10 completed-attempt and >25% success-rate filters before ranking, then derive best/runner-up, margin baseline, and totalN only from the qualified set; skip steps with no qualified agents. Proposed regression coverage in src/components/__tests__/lease-audit-view-helpers.test.ts is adequate, including the mixed-step skew case, fewer-than-10 exclusion, <=25% exclusion, preserved tie-break ordering among qualified rows, and omission when all agents are filtered out. No knot invariants are listed, and the plan is feasible without scope expansion.
